sourceDebug.startsWith: NRL 2026, Round 21, Late Mail, injuries, team updates, late changes, team lists | NRL.com Skip to main content Main News Watch Travel Draw Ladder Players Stats Fantasy Tipping More About Us Accommodation Careers Child Safety Clubs Community Competitions Hall of Fame Integrity Indigenous Judiciary and Match Review Media Releases Memorabilia NRL Pacific Operations Play Rugby League Watch Overseas Wellbeing and Education Membership Tickets Hospitality Shop Search Log In You have skipped the navigation, tab for page content Team Lists Presented By NRL Late Mail: Round 21 - Knights lose Ponga; Doueihi disappears Author NRL.com Timestamp Thu 23 Jul 2026, 08:51 PM Share on social media Share via Facebook Share via Twitter Share via Whats-app Share via Reddit Share via Email Knights superstar Kalyn Ponga is out of Friday's clash against the Roosters due to quad tightness. The reshuffle sees Fletcher Sharpe move to fullback and Sandon Smith join the starting side at five-eighth. The loss of David Fifita to suspension and Cameron Murray and Tallis Duncan to injury has forced the Rabbitohs into a major reshuffle ahead of their crucial clash with the Storm. Goalkicking centre Latrell Siegwalt

The reshuffle sees Fletcher Sharpe move to fullback and Sandon Smith join the starting side at five-eighth. The loss of David Fifita to suspension and Cameron Murray and Tallis Duncan to injury has forced the Rabbitohs into a major reshuffle ahead of their crucial clash with the Storm. Goalkicking centre Latrell Siegwalt lines up for his career seventh game while Lachlan Hubner starts at lock and Liam Le Blanc is also set for a call-up. See all the late mail, official team news and updates for Round 21 of the 2026 NRL Telstra Premiership competition.
